title: Power Integrations Reports Third-Quarter Financial Results
text: Power Integrations announced financial results for Q3 2025 ended September 30, 2025. Net revenues for the third quarter were $118.9 million, up 3% compared to the prior quarter and up 3% from the third quarter of 2024. Net income for the third quarter of 2025 was $20.2 million or $0.36 per diluted share compared to $0.35 per diluted share in the prior quarter and $0.40 per diluted share in the third quarter of 2024. This quarterly report represents an earnings surprise of +5.88%. Q3 2025 revenues were driven by industrial, communications, and computer segments, while consumer declined due to appliance softness and inventory adjustments. The industrial business demonstrated strong growth with a 20% year-over-year increase in the third quarter. The company's board of directors increased the quarterly dividend to $0.215 per share for each of the four quarters of 2026. Share repurchases totaled $42.4 million (919,000 shares) in Q3 2025. Q4 2025 revenue is expected at $100-$105 million, with significant declines in consumer (appliances) and somewhat lower industrial revenues.
